languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

languages.text: "Эти солдаты несут свой долг перед Неумирающим долгие столетия. Их молитвы схожи с нашими, как нити разных паутин, ведущих к одной Ткачихе".
languages.translation_comment: characters enter in the camp of unfamiliar guardsmen

languages.text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."
languages.original_text: "Эти солдаты несут свой долг перед Неумирающим долгие столетия. Их молитвы схожи с нашими, как нити разных паутин, ведущих к одной Ткачихе".

traits.locale_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one Spinner."
"These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one Spinner."
"These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one Spinner."

languages.text: 「この兵士たちは、何世紀にもわたって不死の者への義務を果たしてきた。彼らの祈りは、私たちと同じ、異なる蜘蛛の巣の糸が1人の紡ぎ手につながっているのと同じだ」
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: 「この兵士たちは、何世紀にもわたって不死の者への義務を果たしてきた。彼らの祈りは、私たちと同じ、異なる蜘蛛の巣の糸が1人の紡ぎ手につながっているのと同じだ。」

languages.text: « Ces soldats accomplissent leur devoir envers l'Immortel depuis des siècles. Leurs prières sont semblables aux nôtres, comme les fils de différentes toiles qui mènent tous à un seul et même Tisseur. »
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: « Ces soldats accomplissent leur devoir envers l'Immortel depuis des siècles. Leurs prières sont semblables aux nôtres, comme les fils de différentes toiles qui mènent tous à un seul et même Tisseur. »

languages.text: "Diese Soldaten haben ihre Pflicht gegenüber dem Todlosen seit Jahrhunderten ertragen. Ihre Gebete gleichen den unseren wie Fäden unterschiedlicher Netze, die zu einem Spinner führen."
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Soldaten haben ihre Pflicht gegenüber dem Todlosen seit Jahrhunderten ertragen. Ihre Gebete gleichen den unseren wie Fäden unterschiedlicher Netze, die zu einem Spinner führen."

languages.text: "Bu askerler, Ölmeyen'e karşı vazifelerini yüzyıllardır sürdürüyor. Duaları, bizimkiler gibi tek bir Dokur'a giden farklı ağların iplikleri gibi."
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: "Bu askerler, Ölmeyen'e karşı vazifelerini yüzyıllardır sürdürüyor. Duaları, bizimkiler gibi tek bir Dokur'a giden farklı ağların iplikleri gibi."

languages.text: «Estos soldados han cumplido con su deber hacia el Inmortal durante siglos. Sus plegarias son como las nuestras, como hilos de distintas telarañas que conducen todos a un mismo tejedor».
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: «Estos soldados han cumplido con su deber hacia el Inmortal durante siglos. Sus plegarias son como las nuestras, como hilos de distintas telarañas que conducen todos a un mismo tejedor».

languages.text: “这些士兵为不死之神肩负职责已有数百年。他们的祈祷与我们相似，如同不同蛛网的丝线，都引向同一位编织者。”
languages.original_text: "These soldiers have borne their duty to the Undying One for centuries. Their prayers are like ours, like threads of different webs leading to one spinner."

traits.locale_text: “这些士兵为不死之神肩负职责已有数百年。他们的祈祷与我们相似，如同不同蛛网的丝线，都引向同一位编织者。”
